title: Crowned Herobrine [LEGACY]
description: Adds a new boss called Crowned Herobrine that is a formidable opponent. He drops a useful crown ;)
body:
# THIS MOD IS A TECH DEMO - Not intended for use in survival. Expect many bugs - especially with spawning

## Summon a New Formidable Foe
Crowned Herobrine is mad. But killing him will drop **Crown Shards** that can be crafted into **Herobrine's Crown**. _The wearer of this crown will get permanent speed, and get invisibility while crouching._

All animations and models by yours truly :D
